title: Ganga boat iftar: Varanasi Sessions court denies bail to all 14 accused
description: A Varanasi court on Wednesday denied bail to fourteen Muslim men, who were booked for hosting an Iftar (fast-breaking evening meal eaten by Muslims during the Ramadan month) on a boat on Ganga. Additional Sessions Judge Vinod Kumar passed the order denying bail to Azad Ali, Aamir Kaiki, Danish Saifi, Mohd. Ahmad, Nehal Afridi, Mahfooz Alam, Mohd. Anas, Mohd. Awwal, Mohd. Tahseem, Mohd. Ahmad alias Raja, Mohd. Noor Ismail, Mohd. Tausif Ahmad, Mohd. Faizan, and Mohd. Sameer. The accused had been d
